KSI-CNA-01.description: Configure information resources to limit traffic
KSI-CNA-01.justification: Validates basic network access controls are configured

cli_commands.note: Check security groups have restrictive rules
Validate VPC configuration exists

KSI-CNA-02.description: Design systems to minimize attack surface

cli_commands.note: Check subnet segmentation
Verify custom security groups exist

KSI-CNA-03.description: Use logical networking for traffic flow controls
KSI-CNA-03.justification: Validates network routing and access controls

cli_commands.note: Check Network ACL configurations
Validate routing configurations

KSI-CNA-04.justification: Validates Infrastructure as Code and standardized deployments

cli_commands.command: aws cloudformation list-stacks --stack-status-filter CREATE_COMPLETE UPDATE_COMPLETE --output json
cli_commands.note: Check CloudFormation stacks for IaC patterns
Validate standardized launch templates

KSI-CNA-05.justification: Validates basic DDoS protection is enabled

cli_commands.note: Check AWS Shield protection status

KSI-CNA-06.description: Design for high availability and recovery
KSI-CNA-06.justification: Validates multi-AZ design and backup capabilities

cli_commands.note: Check multi-AZ subnet distribution
Validate backup plans exist

KSI-CNA-07.justification: Validates basic AWS configuration best practices

cli_commands.note: Check if Config rules are configured

KSI-SVC-01.description: Harden and review network and system configurations
KSI-SVC-01.justification: Validates system hardening through security groups, NACLs, and instance configurations

cli_commands.note: Check security group configurations for hardening
Review instance configurations and security settings

KSI-SVC-02.justification: Validates network traffic encryption through load balancers, VPC endpoints, and HTTPS configurations

cli_commands.note: Check load balancer SSL/TLS configurations
Validate VPC endpoints for private service communication

KSI-SVC-03.description: Encrypt all federal and sensitive information at rest
KSI-SVC-03.justification: Validates at-rest encryption for S3, EBS, RDS, and other storage services

cli_commands.note: Get S3 buckets for encryption validation
Check EBS volume encryption status

KSI-SVC-04.justification: Validates centralized configuration management through Systems Manager and Config

cli_commands.note: Check Systems Manager Parameter Store for centralized config
Validate AWS Config for configuration management

KSI-SVC-05.description: Enforce system integrity through cryptographic means
KSI-SVC-05.justification: Validates integrity protection through CloudTrail log file validation and file integrity monitoring

cli_commands.note: Check CloudTrail log file validation for integrity
Validate KMS keys available for cryptographic integrity

KSI-SVC-06.justification: Validates automated key management through AWS KMS and certificate management

cli_commands.note: Check KMS keys for automated key management
Validate certificate management through ACM

KSI-SVC-07.justification: Validates patch management through Systems Manager and automated patching

cli_commands.note: Check patch baselines for consistent patching approach
Validate SSM agent coverage for automated patching

KSI-IAM-01.description: Enforce phishing-resistant MFA for all user authentication
KSI-IAM-01.justification: Validates phishing-resistant MFA methods (hardware tokens, WebAuthn) are configured for all users

cli_commands.note: Get all IAM users for MFA analysis
Check MFA devices to validate phishing-resistant methods

KSI-IAM-02.description: Use secure passwordless methods or strong passwords with MFA
KSI-IAM-02.justification: Validates passwordless authentication where feasible, otherwise strong password policy with MFA

cli_commands.note: Check strong password policy enforcement
Check for passwordless methods (access keys vs console passwords)

KSI-IAM-03.description: Enforce secure authentication for non-user accounts and services
KSI-IAM-03.justification: Validates service accounts use appropriate authentication methods (roles, not long-term keys)

cli_commands.note: Check IAM roles for service authentication
Validate AWS service-linked roles for secure service authentication

KSI-IAM-04.description: Use least-privileged, role-based, and just-in-time authorization
KSI-IAM-04.justification: Validates least privilege implementation through roles, policies, and time-based access controls

cli_commands.note: Analyze roles for least privilege implementation
Validate current session-based access (just-in-time principle)

KSI-IAM-05.justification: Validates zero trust through continuous verification, conditional access, and comprehensive logging

cli_commands.note: Check continuous monitoring and verification logging
Check for conditional access policies implementing zero trust

KSI-IAM-06.description: Automatically disable accounts with privileged access on suspicious activity
KSI-IAM-06.justification: Validates automated response capabilities for privileged account security incidents

cli_commands.note: Check for automated alarms on suspicious privileged activities
Check for automated response functions for account security
Check SNS topics for security alert notifications
Verify active subscriptions for security notifications

KSI-MLA-01.description: Operate a SIEM or similar system for centralized, tamper-resistant logging
KSI-MLA-01.justification: Validates centralized logging with tamper resistance through CloudTrail, CloudWatch, and log integrity

cli_commands.note: Check CloudTrail for centralized, tamper-resistant logging
Validate centralized log collection in CloudWatch

KSI-MLA-02.justification: Validates log review processes through automated analysis, alerting, and audit capabilities

cli_commands.note: Check CloudWatch alarms for automated log review
Validate metric filters for log analysis and auditing
Check SNS topics for log review notifications

KSI-MLA-03.description: Rapidly detect and remediate or mitigate vulnerabilities
KSI-MLA-03.justification: Validates rapid vulnerability detection and response through Security Hub, Inspector, and automated remediation

cli_commands.note: Check Security Hub for rapid vulnerability detection
Validate Inspector for automated vulnerability scanning

KSI-MLA-04.description: Perform authenticated vulnerability scanning on information resources
KSI-MLA-04.justification: Validates authenticated vulnerability scanning capabilities through Inspector and Security Hub

cli_commands.note: Check Inspector coverage for authenticated vulnerability scanning
Validate information resources available for vulnerability scanning

KSI-MLA-05.description: Perform Infrastructure as Code and configuration evaluation and testing
KSI-MLA-05.justification: Validates IaC security evaluation through Config rules, CloudFormation, and configuration testing

cli_commands.note: Check Config rules for Infrastructure as Code evaluation

cli_commands.command: aws cloudformation list-stacks --stack-status-filter CREATE_COMPLETE UPDATE_COMPLETE --output json
cli_commands.note: Validate CloudFormation stacks for IaC configuration testing

KSI-MLA-06.description: Centrally track and prioritize mitigation/remediation of identified vulnerabilities
KSI-MLA-06.justification: Validates centralized vulnerability tracking and prioritization through Security Hub and findings management

cli_commands.note: Get Security Hub findings for centralized vulnerability tracking
Check Inspector findings for vulnerability prioritization

KSI-CMT-01.justification: Validates system modification logging through CloudTrail and Config change tracking

cli_commands.note: Check CloudTrail for system modification logging
Validate Config for configuration change monitoring

KSI-CMT-02.description: Execute changes through redeployment of version controlled immutable resources
KSI-CMT-02.justification: Validates immutable infrastructure patterns through CloudFormation and version control practices

cli_commands.command: aws cloudformation list-stacks --stack-status-filter CREATE_COMPLETE UPDATE_COMPLETE --output json
cli_commands.note: Check CloudFormation for immutable infrastructure deployments
Validate launch templates for immutable instance deployments

KSI-CMT-03.description: Implement automated testing and validation of changes prior to deployment
KSI-CMT-03.justification: Validates automated testing through CodeBuild, CodePipeline, and pre-deployment validation

cli_commands.note: Check CodeBuild projects for automated testing
Validate CodePipeline for automated change validation

KSI-CMT-04.description: Have a documented change management procedure
KSI-CMT-04.justification: Manual evidence required - documented procedures and policies

cli_commands.note: Check evidence_v2/KSI-CMT-04/ for change_management_procedure.pdf and related documentation

KSI-CMT-05.description: Evaluate the risk and potential impact of any change
KSI-CMT-05.justification: Manual evidence required - risk assessment procedures and impact analysis documentation

cli_commands.note: Check evidence_v2/KSI-CMT-05/ for risk_assessment_procedure.pdf and change_impact_analysis_template.pdf

KSI-PIY-01.description: Have an up-to-date information resource inventory or code defining all deployed assets, software, and services
KSI-PIY-01.justification: Validates asset inventory through AWS resource discovery and documented inventory records

cli_commands.note: Get comprehensive resource inventory across all AWS services
Check evidence_v2/KSI-PIY-01/ for asset_inventory.xlsx and software_inventory.pdf

KSI-PIY-02.description: Have policies outlining the security objectives of all information resources
KSI-PIY-02.justification: Manual evidence required - security policies and objectives documentation

cli_commands.note: Check evidence_v2/KSI-PIY-02/ for security_policy.pdf, information_security_objectives.pdf, and resource_security_standards.pdf

KSI-PIY-03.justification: Manual evidence required - vulnerability disclosure policy and program documentation

cli_commands.note: Check evidence_v2/KSI-PIY-03/ for vulnerability_disclosure_policy.pdf and responsible_disclosure_program.pdf

KSI-PIY-04.description: Build security considerations into SDLC and align with CISA Secure By Design principles
KSI-PIY-04.justification: Validates secure development through CodeCommit, CodeBuild security scanning, and SDLC documentation

cli_commands.note: Check code repositories for secure development practices
Check evidence_v2/KSI-PIY-04/ for secure_sdlc_procedures.pdf and cisa_secure_by_design_alignment.pdf

KSI-PIY-05.description: Document methods used to evaluate information resource implementations
KSI-PIY-05.justification: Manual evidence required - evaluation methodologies and assessment procedures

cli_commands.note: Check evidence_v2/KSI-PIY-05/ for evaluation_methodology.pdf, security_assessment_procedures.pdf, and implementation_review_process.pdf

KSI-PIY-06.description: Have dedicated staff and budget for security with executive support
KSI-PIY-06.justification: Manual evidence required - organizational structure, budget allocation, and executive endorsement

cli_commands.note: Check evidence_v2/KSI-PIY-06/ for security_org_chart.pdf, security_budget_allocation.pdf, and executive_security_charter.pdf

KSI-PIY-07.description: Document risk management decisions for software supply chain security
KSI-PIY-07.justification: Manual evidence required - supply chain risk management documentation and decisions

cli_commands.note: Check evidence_v2/KSI-PIY-07/ for supply_chain_risk_management.pdf, vendor_security_assessments.pdf, and software_supply_chain_policy.pdf

KSI-TPR-01.justification: Validates third-party resource identification through AWS services and documented third-party inventory

cli_commands.note: Check for cross-account roles indicating third-party integrations
Check evidence_v2/KSI-TPR-01/ for third_party_inventory.xlsx, saas_services_list.pdf, and vendor_registry.pdf

KSI-TPR-02.description: Regularly confirm services handling federal information are FedRAMP authorized and securely configured
KSI-TPR-02.justification: Validates FedRAMP authorization verification and secure configuration of federal information handling services

cli_commands.note: Check for organizational structure and account boundaries for federal information
Check evidence_v2/KSI-TPR-02/ for fedramp_authorization_verification.xlsx, service_security_configurations.pdf, and federal_data_flow_analysis.pdf

KSI-TPR-03.description: Identify and prioritize mitigation of potential supply chain risks
KSI-TPR-03.justification: Manual evidence required - supply chain risk assessment and mitigation planning

cli_commands.note: Check evidence_v2/KSI-TPR-03/ for supply_chain_risk_assessment.pdf, risk_mitigation_plan.pdf, and vendor_risk_matrix.xlsx

KSI-TPR-04.description: Monitor third party software for upstream vulnerabilities with contractual notification or active monitoring
KSI-TPR-04.justification: Validates vulnerability monitoring through Inspector, Security Hub, and contractual requirements documentation

cli_commands.note: Check Inspector findings for third-party component vulnerabilities
Check evidence_v2/KSI-TPR-04/ for vulnerability_monitoring_contracts.pdf, upstream_vulnerability_procedures.pdf, and third_party_notification_agreements.pdf

KSI-CED-01.description: Ensure all employees receive security awareness training
KSI-CED-01.justification: Manual evidence required - security awareness training programs, completion records, and training materials

cli_commands.note: Check evidence_v2/KSI-CED-01/ for security_awareness_training_program.pdf, employee_training_records.xlsx, training_completion_certificates.pdf, and annual_training_schedule.pdf

KSI-CED-02.description: Require role-specific training for high risk roles, including at least roles with privileged access
KSI-CED-02.justification: Manual evidence required - role-specific training curricula, privileged access training records, and specialized cybersecurity training documentation

cli_commands.note: Check evidence_v2/KSI-CED-02/ for privileged_access_training.pdf, role_specific_training_matrix.xlsx, admin_security_training_records.pdf, and specialized_cybersecurity_curriculum.pdf

KSI-RPL-01.description: Define Recovery Time Objectives (RTO) and Recovery Point Objectives (RPO)
KSI-RPL-01.justification: Manual evidence required - documented RTO/RPO definitions and business impact analysis

cli_commands.note: Check evidence_v2/KSI-RPL-01/ for rto_rpo_definitions.pdf, business_impact_analysis.pdf, and recovery_objectives_matrix.xlsx

KSI-RPL-02.description: Develop and maintain a recovery plan that aligns with defined recovery objectives
KSI-RPL-02.justification: Manual evidence required - disaster recovery plans, incident response procedures, and recovery playbooks

cli_commands.note: Check evidence_v2/KSI-RPL-02/ for disaster_recovery_plan.pdf, incident_response_plan.pdf, recovery_procedures_playbook.pdf, and business_continuity_plan.pdf

KSI-RPL-03.description: Perform system backups aligned with recovery objectives
KSI-RPL-03.justification: Validates backup implementation through AWS Backup, EBS snapshots, and RDS backups aligned with documented objectives INCLUDING retention policies

cli_commands.note: Check AWS Backup plans for systematic backup implementation

cli_commands.command: aws backup get-backup-plan --backup-plan-id $(aws backup list-backup-plans --query 'BackupPlansList[0].BackupPlanId' --output text) --output json
cli_commands.note: Get detailed backup plan configuration including retention policies
Validate EBS snapshots for system backup coverage

KSI-RPL-04.description: Regularly test the capability to recover from incidents and contingencies
KSI-RPL-04.justification: Manual evidence required - recovery testing procedures, test results, and lessons learned documentation

cli_commands.note: Check evidence_v2/KSI-RPL-04/ for recovery_testing_procedures.pdf, disaster_recovery_test_results.xlsx, tabletop_exercise_reports.pdf, and recovery_lessons_learned.pdf

KSI-INR-01.description: Report incidents according to FedRAMP requirements and cloud service provider policies
KSI-INR-01.justification: Manual evidence required - incident reporting procedures, FedRAMP compliance documentation, and reporting policy alignment

cli_commands.note: Check evidence_v2/KSI-INR-01/ for incident_reporting_procedures.pdf, fedramp_incident_reporting_policy.pdf, incident_notification_templates.pdf, and regulatory_compliance_procedures.pdf

KSI-INR-02.description: Maintain a log of incidents and periodically review past incidents for patterns or vulnerabilities
KSI-INR-02.justification: Validates incident logging infrastructure and manual incident tracking with pattern analysis

cli_commands.note: Check for security-related log groups for incident logging infrastructure
Check evidence_v2/KSI-INR-02/ for incident_log_register.xlsx, incident_pattern_analysis.pdf, vulnerability_trend_reports.pdf, and periodic_incident_reviews.pdf

KSI-INR-03.description: Generate after action reports and regularly incorporate lessons learned into operations
KSI-INR-03.justification: Manual evidence required - after action reports, lessons learned documentation, and operational improvement tracking

cli_commands.note: Check evidence_v2/KSI-INR-03/ for after_action_reports.pdf, lessons_learned_database.xlsx, operational_improvements_tracking.pdf, and incident_response_improvements.pdf
